content.problemStatement:
You're given two positive integers LLL and RRR (L<RL \lt RL<R).

Let N=R‚àíL+1N = R-L+1N=R‚àíL+1.

Consider the array A=[L,L+1,L+2,‚Ä¶,R]A = [L, L+1, L+2, \ldots, R]A=[L,L+1,L+2,‚Ä¶,R] of length NNN that contains every integer from LLL to RRR exactly once, in order.

Find any array BBB of length NNN such that:


Every integer from LLL to RRR appears exactly once in BBB; and
For each 1‚â§i‚â§N1 \leq i \leq N1‚â§i‚â§N, gcd‚Å°(Ai,Bi)=1\gcd(A_i, B_i) = 1gcd(Ai‚Äã,Bi‚Äã)=1.
If no such BBB exists, print ‚àí1-1‚àí1 instead.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of a single line, containing two space-separated integers LLL and RRR.


Output Format

For each test case,

If no valid array BBB exists, print the single integer ‚àí1-1‚àí1.
Otherwise, print NNN space-separated integers denoting the array BBB.

Each integer from LLL to RRR should appear exactly once, and gcd‚Å°(Ai,Bi)=1\gcd(A_i, B_i) = 1gcd(Ai‚Äã,Bi‚Äã)=1 should hold for each iii.



If there are multiple solutions possible, you may print **any of them**.
constraints: The sum of R‚àíLR-LR‚àíL across all test cases won't exceed 2‚ãÖ1052\cdot 10^52‚ãÖ105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: With L=3L = 3L=3 and R=7R = 7R=7, we have A=[3,4,5,6,7]A = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]A=[3,4,5,6,7].
Consider B=[7,3,6,5,4]B = [7, 3, 6, 5, 4]B=[7,3,6,5,4]. Looking at each index:

gcd‚Å°(A1,B1)=gcd‚Å°(3,7)=1\gcd(A_1, B_1) = \gcd(3, 7) = 1gcd(A1‚Äã,B1‚Äã)=gcd(3,7)=1
gcd‚Å°(A2,B2)=gcd‚Å°(4,3)=1\gcd(A_2, B_2) = \gcd(4, 3) = 1gcd(A2‚Äã,B2‚Äã)=gcd(4,3)=1
gcd‚Å°(A3,B3)=gcd‚Å°(5,6)=1\gcd(A_3, B_3) = \gcd(5, 6) = 1gcd(A3‚Äã,B3‚Äã)=gcd(5,6)=1
gcd‚Å°(A4,B4)=gcd‚Å°(6,5)=1\gcd(A_4, B_4) = \gcd(6, 5) = 1gcd(A4‚Äã,B4‚Äã)=gcd(6,5)=1
gcd‚Å°(A5,B5)=gcd‚Å°(7,4)=1\gcd(A_5, B_5) = \gcd(7, 4) = 1gcd(A5‚Äã,B5‚Äã)=gcd(7,4)=1

BBB also contains every integer from LLL to RRR exactly once, so it's a valid array.
Test case 222: With L=1L = 1L=1 and R=3R = 3R=3, we have A=[1,2,3]A = [1, 2, 3]A=[1,2,3].
You may verify that the valid arrays BBB are [1,3,2],[2,3,1],[3,1,2][1, 3, 2], [2, 3, 1], [3, 1, 2][1,3,2],[2,3,1],[3,1,2].
Printing any one of them will be considered correct.
